chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S- 383 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 15.10.2025. Mr. Khalid Hussain Lakho, D.P.G for State. = None have been present in this matter on the last several dates of hearing i.e. 27.08.2019, 10.01.2020, 14.12.2020, 03.04.2025 and 25.04.2025 and once again today. No intimation is received. It appears that the applicant has lost his interest in pursuing this Criminal Miscellaneous Application which is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Tufail
